title: tephrosia capitulata
intro: Tephrosia capitulata is a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae), commonly known as the Cape bee tree or Cape bee plant, native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. The medicinal properties of Tephrosia capitulata have been studied, and it is reported to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include the potential treatment of various ailments such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Tephrosia capitulata is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, although its preparation and use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
